description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-select`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-select/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 20 defects — 2 P0, 7 P1, 11 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] 01: `_syncClonedOptions()` silently drops `<optgroup>` children
- [ ] [P0] 02: Error div uses `role="alert"` AND `aria-live="polite"` simultaneously

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-select
